meta_description: RebelsFunding pricing guide 2026: Entry fees from $25, up to 200% refund, no time limits. See all plans, costs, and hidden fees before you sign up.
excerpt: RebelsFunding offers entry fees from $25, no time limits, and up to 200% refund. See all verified plans, costs, and limitations in this 2026 pricing guide.
content:
RebelsFunding Overview

RebelsFunding is a proprietary trading firm best known for its cost-effective entry and flexible challenge structure. As of March 2026, it stands out for offering no time limits on challenge completion, making it attractive for traders who prefer to work at their own pace. For a detailed breakdown of features and user experiences, see our RebelsFunding review.

Plan Options & Pricing

According to the official RebelsFunding site (data verified March 2026), entry fees start at just $25, which is among the lowest in the industry. The firm does not publish a full public list of all plan tiers or account sizes. If you need precise plan breakdowns, refer directly to their official pricing page.

  • Entry Fee: Starts at $25
  • Refund Policy: Up to 200% challenge fee refund upon passing
  • No Time Limit: Complete the challenge at your own pace

Other details such as scaling options, profit splits, or minimum/maximum account sizes are not verified in the available data. Always check the official source for the latest plan specifics.

Hidden Fees & Important Limitations

RebelsFunding is transparent about its low entry costs, but there are a few important limitations to consider:

  • Platform Restriction: No MetaTrader 4 or 5 support; traders must use RebelsFunding's proprietary platform.
  • Instrument Selection: Limited compared to major competitors (exact instruments not specified in public data).

No additional hidden fees are disclosed in the verified tool data. For any updates or less common charges, consult the official RebelsFunding FAQ.

For a side-by-side breakdown, see our Apex Trader Funding vs RebelsFunding comparison.

Pros & Cons of RebelsFunding Pricing

  • Pros:
    • No time limit on challenge completion
    • Industry-lowest entry fees (from $25)
    • Up to 200% challenge fee refund for successful traders
  • Cons:
    • No MetaTrader 4/5 support (proprietary platform only)
    • Limited instrument selection compared to other prop firms

Who Should Choose RebelsFunding?

RebelsFunding is best suited for cost-conscious traders, forex traders, and those who value flexibility in challenge timelines. If you require MetaTrader support or a wide range of trading instruments, you may want to consider alternatives. For more context, read our RebelsFunding review or compare with AquaFunded and Blue Guardian.

TradingToolsHub Recommendation

Based on the verified data as of March 2026, RebelsFunding offers one of the lowest-cost entry points in the prop trading space, with a unique no-time-limit approach and generous refund potential. However, its proprietary-only platform and limited instrument selection may be dealbreakers for some. If low upfront cost and flexible pacing are your top priorities, RebelsFunding is worth considering. For the most current details or to verify any missing information, always check the official RebelsFunding website.
